headline: MARKET WRAP — May 24
telegramText: Weekend brief — tradfi data reflects Fri 2026-05-22 close. Crypto data is live. MARKET WRAP — May 24, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Today's session crystallized the rotation from defensives into cyclical growth, with semiconductors and uranium capturing the bid while traditional safe havens sold off. Crypto showed resilience despite ongoing ETF outflows, driven by token-specific catalysts rather than broad-based demand. Tomorrow's focus shifts to whether this cyclical momentum can sustain or if defensive positioning returns as the initial rotation excitement fades. CLOSING PRICES SPY +0.6% | QQQ +0.6% | VIX -0.4% | TLT +0.9% | DXY +0.1% | OIL +0.3% vs MORNING SPY -0.2% | QQQ -0.2% | TLT -0.4% EVENING NEWS ▲ Iran and US near memorandum of understanding as Bitcoin rallies past $82K on de-escalation hopes ▲ This Week in Crypto: Bitcoin Swing, Iran Deal, Cardano Risk and More ▼ Pudgy Penguins down 14% after 712 mln token unlock: Can PENGU rebound? ▲ Bitcoin Recovers as US-Iran Peace Deal Reportedly Signed, Altcoins Gain Big ▲ Trump claims deal with Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz ‘largely negotiated’ SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↑ Recession · ↓↓ Goldilocks · ↑ Stagflation · ↑ Hegemony · ↑ Displacement REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 72.1/100 (High). Phase: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: SMH +2.1%, URA +1.9%, XLU +1.9%, XLC -0.6%, XLP -0.8%. Sector dispersion: 57 (HIGH, breadth BROAD_STRENGTH), 81% positive 1w.
